hook.text: UNITED JOIN AMAZON'S ALL OR NOTHING SERIES

beats.text: FULL DRESSING ROOM ACCESS FOR THE 2026/27 SEASON
UNITED LAND A RECORD FEE BEATING CITY AND ARSENAL
THE DOCUMENTARY LANDS ON PRIME VIDEO IN SUMMER 2027

caption: It's official — Manchester United are joining Amazon Prime Video's All or Nothing series! 🔴🎬 The cameras get full dressing room and training ground access throughout the 2026/27 season. The Times reports United landed a record fee that eclipses the deals paid to City and Arsenal. It drops on Prime Video in Summer 2027. Excited to see what goes on behind the scenes? Let us know below 👇 #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #allornothing #amazonprime #documentary
